The [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]] '''57C holocam''', also known as an '''automatic camera''', was used by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces on the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] for surveillance purposes.

==Description==
The 57C holocam was comprised of a bank of six [[visual scanner]]s arranged in a three by two grid clustered around two [[Audio sensor/Legends|audio pickups]]. The units were mounted on brackets descending from the ceiling, attached to a rotation joint at the rear of the camera. [[Motion sensor/Legends|Motion sensors]] allowed the 57C to track the movement of individuals within range, and the data was relayed by a [[signal transmitter]] and [[data relay]]s built into the unit.<ref name="EGWT" />

A military-grade unit,<ref name="EGWT" /> the 57C captured [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] images in high detail, allowing images to be reviewed with greater clarity. Despite their widespread use in military bases, the 57C was not intended for use in a combat zone and were prone to exploding when shot by [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] fire.<ref name="NEGWT" />

==History==
57C holocams were used extensively by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and were installed in all of their military bases. [[Detention Block AA-23/Legends|Detention Block AA-23]] on the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|DS-1 Orbital Battle Station]] was monitored by 57C units, and after [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] [[Rescue of Princess Leia/Legends|rescued]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], the footage from the cameras was used to identify them.<ref name="EGWT" />
